subcodes.first_line: O thou who art named Zabíḥ! Praise be to the Lord of Oneness that thou hast found thy way to the sacrificial altar of love and hast discovered the place of sacrifice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی ذبیح حمد حضرت احدیت را که بقربانگاه عشق راه یافتی و بمشهد فدا پی بردی
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @martyrs and martyrdom
